title: Build Synthex Pipedream command-center control plane
description: Build the service-layer control plane for the Synthex Pipedream: Board input intake, Margot conversation pass, Nexus ontology linking, @team routing, scenario drafts, presentation QA, provider readiness, and outcome learning. Source plan: docs/unite-group/synthex-pipedream-sandbox-to-live-plan-2026-05-19.md.

title: Add draft-only command-centre intake route
description: Add POST /api/command-centre/intake as a thin route with Zod validation, Supabase auth, organisation scoping, and a draft-only CommandPacket response. No external execution, publishing, spend, or provider calls in this phase.

title: Add @team and Margot queue panel to Command Centre
description: Extend the existing Command Centre UI with Board input queue, Margot queue, @team dispatch cards, evidence/risk/approval/provider badges, and failure-state visibility. Must pass desktop and mobile browser QA.

title: Add presentation QA gate for live-event and Gen Media packets
description: Build a presentation QA service and UI gate for generated board packets, live-event decks, visual boards, and Gen Media briefs. Must detect text overflow, clipping, mobile reflow failures, missing evidence, and missing approval state.

title: Wire Hermes continuous-ops observation into Synthex sandbox plan
description: Use Hermes as the local continuous-ops assistant for status observation, morning briefs, Telegram intake support, and handoff packets. Keep all public actions, production deployments, spend, and private-data broadcast behind explicit gates.
